parents.subject: LU-12542 ldlm: don't access l_resource when not locked.

commit.subject: LU-13310 ldlm: Fix memory leak in ldlm_lock_enqueue
commit.message:
LU-13310 ldlm: Fix memory leak in ldlm_lock_enqueue

ldlm_lock_enqueue() may allocate memory and not free it
if req_can_reconstruct() returns non-zero.

HPE-bug-id: LUS-8551
Signed-off-by: Shaun Tancheff <shaun.tancheff@hpe.com>
Change-Id: I439221722caf0c376eb043598dbd4f4d038d215e
